title: Magento Order
description: A sales order in Adobe Commerce (Magento). Represents a completed purchase transaction including the customer, line items, billing and shipping addresses, payment method, and all financial totals. Orders are created from shopping cart quotes and progress through a lifecycle of states including new, processing, complete, closed, and canceled.

entity_id.description: Numeric order entity ID assigned by Commerce. Read-only after creation.

increment_id.description: Human-readable order number displayed to merchants and customers (e.g. 000000001). Zero-padded numeric string determined by the store's order ID prefix and increment settings.

store_id.description: Numeric store view entity ID indicating which store view the order was placed through.

status.description: Current order status code. Merchants can define custom statuses in addition to the built-in defaults.

state.description: Internal state machine state of the order. States are a smaller set than statuses and drive available actions on the order.

customer_id.description: Numeric customer entity ID. Null for guest orders.

customer_email.description: Email address of the customer or guest who placed the order. Required for both registered and guest orders.

customer_firstname.description: Customer first name as entered during checkout.

customer_lastname.description: Customer last name as entered during checkout.

customer_is_guest.description: Whether the order was placed by a guest shopper (not a registered customer account).

customer_group_id.description: Customer group ID at the time of order placement. Affects pricing, tax, and shipping rules applied.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp in UTC when the order was created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp in UTC when the order record was last modified.

grand_total.description: Order grand total including subtotal, tax, shipping, and applied discounts. In the order's display currency.

subtotal.description: Sum of line item row totals before tax, shipping, and discounts.

tax_amount.description: Total tax amount applied to the order.

shipping_amount.description: Shipping fee charged on the order before any shipping discounts.

discount_amount.description: Total discount amount applied to the order from cart price rules and coupon codes. Typically a negative value.

base_currency_code.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the store's base currency used in base_grand_total and base_* fields.

order_currency_code.description: ISO 4217 currency code in which the order was placed and displayed to the customer.

coupon_code.description: Coupon code applied to the order, if any.

shipping_method.description: Carrier and method code for the selected shipping method (e.g. flatrate_flatrate, ups_ground).

shipping_description.description: Human-readable shipping method description shown to the customer.

billing_address.description: Billing address used for payment authorization.

extension_attributes.description: Extension attributes provided by Commerce modules. Common extension attributes include shipping_assignments for multi-address orders and payment_additional_info for payment gateway data.

items.description: Line items in the order. Each item represents a purchased product with its quantity, pricing, and fulfillment status.

status_histories.description: Chronological history of order status changes and admin comments.

payment.description: Payment method and transaction details for the order.

Address.description: A postal address for billing or shipping. Used within orders, customers, and quote objects.

address_type.description: Whether this is a billing or shipping address.

firstname.description: First name of the address recipient.

lastname.description: Last name of the address recipient.

email.description: Email address associated with this address.

street.description: Street address lines. The first element is the primary street line; additional elements are continuation lines.

region_id.description: Numeric Commerce region ID for the state or province.

region_code.description: Abbreviated state or province code (e.g. CA, NY, TX).

OrderItem.description: A product line item within a sales order.

order_id.description: Numeric entity ID of the parent order.

sku.description: Product SKU at the time of purchase.

name.description: Product name at the time of purchase.

product_type.description: Product type at the time of purchase.

qty_ordered.description: Total quantity ordered for this item.

qty_refunded.description: Quantity that has been refunded via credit memo.

price.description: Unit price of the product inclusive of any tier pricing applied.

original_price.description: Original catalog price before any discounts or rules were applied.

row_total.description: Line total: unit price multiplied by quantity ordered.

tax_amount.description: Tax amount applied to this line item.

tax_percent.description: Tax percentage rate applied to this item.

discount_amount.description: Discount amount applied to this line item.

weight.description: Product weight used for shipping calculation.

Payment.description: Payment method details and transaction information for an order.

parent_id.description: Numeric order entity ID this payment belongs to.

method.description: Payment method code (e.g. checkmo, braintree, free, payflowpro).

amount_ordered.description: Payment amount to collect equal to the order grand total.

amount_paid.description: Amount that has been captured from the payment method.

amount_authorized.description: Amount authorized but not yet captured.

last_trans_id.description: Transaction ID from the payment gateway for the most recent transaction.

cc_last4.description: Last four digits of the credit card number, if applicable.

StatusHistory.description: An entry in the order status history log.

parent_id.description: Numeric order entity ID this history entry belongs to.

status.description: Order status code at the time this history entry was created.

comment.description: Admin or system comment text for this history entry.

is_customer_notified.description: Whether the customer was notified by email for this history entry. 1 = yes, 0 = no.

is_visible_on_front.description: Whether this comment is visible to the customer in their account. 1 = yes, 0 = no.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this history entry was created.
